name: efficient_collection_incremental_no_reask
notes: Facts land INCREMENTALLY across separate turns (confirm business_type answered tersely, then the 'about' gap answered separately) rather than all in one message — each fact, once given, must never be re-asked in a later turn. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type hardware --draft-city Surat` then `script <tenant> efficient_collection_incremental_no_reask.json`.

steps.note: Entry tap against the pre-seeded business_type confirm.
Terse hinglish confirm ('yes that's right') for business_type='hardware'. Expect the flow to advance to the next gap (about), not repeat the confirm.

steps.message: hum construction aur home hardware ke tools bechte hain, karib 12 saal se
steps.note: Separately answers the 'about' gap (what the business does + how long). Expect this to be recorded and the flow to move on.

steps.message: ab bas ho gaya kya sab kuch?
steps.note: Neither fact given across the two prior separate turns (business type, about) may be re-asked here.
